category_sources: Official README describes ghorg as cloning or backing up organization/user repositories from GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, and more.
source_facts.description says it clones an entire org's or user's repositories.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title uses ghorg.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains installation, configuration, provider support, examples, and troubleshooting.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/gabrie30/ghorg; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official README lists supported providers and repository backup/clone features.
source_facts.description says it clones org/user repositories.
